title: Heat-related labour-hour losses by sector
sourceIndicatorId: India 2025 data sheet, heat-related labour-hour losses in 2024

rows.label: Other sectors
rows.note: Derived residual: 100 minus agriculture and construction shares.

metadata.method: Keeps Lancet's agriculture and construction shares as comparable percentages and derives the residual other-sector share.
metadata.caveat: Labour hours lost are labour-capacity estimates, not a count of deaths or observed wage losses.
